descriptions: Added GetBalance(accountId) export for all account types (Personal/Shared/Savings/Society).
Implemented Framework:onDeposit and Framework:onWithdrawal hooks for external script integration.
Improved UI feedback for Card PIN creation; starting with 0 now triggers an error toast.
Moved 'Card Number' inventory labels to the locale files for full translation support.
Updated documentation for Server Exports and Framework Hooks.
